# Axomor — Northeast India Travel Guide
# https://axomor.com

## About
Axomor is a comprehensive travel guide for Northeast India, covering 250+ destinations
across all 8 northeastern states: Assam, Meghalaya, Sikkim, Arunachal Pradesh,
Nagaland, Manipur, Mizoram, and Tripura.

The site provides detailed, accurate travel information for both Indian and international
visitors, with a focus on wildlife sanctuaries, spiritual sites, hill stations, rivers,
waterfalls, and cultural landmarks.

## What We Cover Per Destination
- Entry fees (Indian nationals and foreigners)
- Visiting hours and closed days
- Permit requirements (ILP, PAP)
- Best months to visit and peak events
- How to reach (distance from airports, railway stations, bus stands)
- GPS coordinates
- Google ratings and review counts
- Photo galleries

## Site Structure
- / — All 250+ destinations, filterable by category
- /states — Browse destinations by state
- /states/{state} — All places in a specific NE state
- /places/{id} — Individual destination detail page
- /plan — Trip planning by hub city and duration
- /map — Interactive map of all destinations

## States Covered
Assam, Meghalaya, Sikkim, Arunachal Pradesh, Nagaland, Manipur, Mizoram, Tripura

## Brand
- Name: Axomor
- Focus: Northeast India travel and tourism
- Tagline: "Where the hills meet the sky, and the rivers remember every name."
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/axomorhq
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/axomorhq

## Content Policy
All destination data is researched and maintained by the Axomor team.
Content may be used for non-commercial travel planning and information purposes.
